categories.name: Herbs (Water-loving)
categories.description: Water-loving, delicate herbs such as basil, mint, parsley, chives, dill, or coriander.

categories.name: Herbs (Mediterranean)
categories.description: Robust, sun-loving Mediterranean herbs such as rosemary, thyme, sage, oregano, marjoram, or lavender.

categories.name: Succulents & Cacti
categories.description: Drought-resistant plants with water storage capability, such as aloe vera, houseleek, echeverias, or cacti.

categories.name: Flowering Plants (Thirsty)
categories.description: Profusely blooming, water-intensive balcony flowers such as hydrangeas, petunias, fuchsias, lantanas, calibrachoa, or lobelia.

categories.name: Flowering Plants (Normal)
categories.description: Classic balcony flowers with moderate water needs such as geraniums, marguerites, begonias, pansies, bellflowers, or forget-me-nots.

categories.name: Vegetables (Thirsty)
categories.description: Water-intensive vegetable plants with large foliage such as tomatoes, cucumbers, or zucchini.

categories.name: Vegetables (Normal)
categories.description: Vegetable plants with moderate water needs such as chili, bell peppers, radishes, or lettuce.

categories.name: Fruits & Berries
categories.description: Berry bushes and fruit plants for the balcony such as strawberries, blueberries, raspberries, or physalis.

categories.name: Container Plants (Mediterranean)
categories.description: Woody container plants with good drought protection such as olive trees, lemon trees, oleander, or fig trees.

categories.name: Climbing Plants & Ivy
categories.description: Climbing plants or ground cover such as ivy, wild grape, honeysuckle, or clematis.

categories.name: Foliage Plants (Shade-loving)
categories.description: Shade-loving foliage plants such as ferns, hostas, or ornamental grasses.
